_description: Size ceiling for meta-agent-chat.ts measured in JS string code units (String.prototype.length), not tokens — deterministic without a tokenizer. Phase 0 captures current size; Phase 7 tightens.
_seed_instructions: To regenerate: WRITE_PROMPT_BUDGET=1 pnpm vitest run test/refactor-phase0.test.ts

phase_targets._comment: Target size after each phase completes, in JS code units. Phase 7 slims the base prompt by extracting workflows to skills/meta/.

_note: Measures meta-agent-chat.ts file size via String.prototype.length (UTF-16 code units), not a runtime buildMetaAgentChatPrompt call, because deploy/ tsconfig doesn't include control-plane/. Drift detection is equivalent: any prompt growth changes the file.
_post_phase_5_note: Phase 5 added ~920 code units: a Skill selection section (~600 chars) explaining enabled_skills, a broadened Skills bullet in the Runtime Infrastructure list, and a tightened create_sub_agent workflow. Growth is intentional — Phase 5's goal is for the meta-agent to know enabled_skills exists and prefer it over inlined skill prose. Phase 7 still targets 8000; the Phase 5 addition will be among the first things extracted to skills/meta/.
